stages.question: Which poster best shows "Failure = Step to Success"?

choices.text: Poster showing failure leads to learning and success
Poster showing failure is the end

stages.question: Which poster best shows "Don't Give Up"?

choices.text: Poster showing persistence and trying again
Poster showing never giving up and practicing
Poster showing giving up after one try

stages.question: Which poster best shows "Learn from Mistakes"?

choices.text: Poster showing using mistakes to improve

stages.question: Which poster best shows "Resilience and Growth"?

choices.text: Poster showing bouncing back and growing stronger
Poster showing staying down after falling
